things.name: Tvrda Fortress Old Town
things.description: Magnificent 18th-century Baroque fortress quarter on the Drava River; the best-preserved Baroque military complex in Croatia with the Holy Trinity Square, Guard Tower and historical museums

things.name: Co-Cathedral of St. Peter and Paul
things.description: Osijek's iconic neo-Gothic church with a 90-metre spire dominating the city skyline; one of the tallest churches in Croatia built in 1900 with the tower visible for miles

things.name: Osijek Promenade (Europska Avenija)
things.description: Elegant Art Nouveau boulevard along the Drava connecting the city's districts; lined with beautifully restored Secession-style villas, cafes and one of Croatia's finest architectural promenades

things.name: Museum of Slavonia
things.description: Croatia's oldest museum in the former Tvrda Town Hall with extensive collections on the archaeology, history, natural history and ethnography of the Slavonia region

things.name: Drava River Promenade
things.description: Beautiful riverside walk along the Drava from Tvrda Fortress to the modern city; popular cycling and jogging route with views of the wide river, beaches and natural surroundings

things.name: Kopacevo and Kopacki Rit Nature Park
things.description: One of Europe's largest and best-preserved wetland nature reserves at the confluence of the Drava and Danube rivers; extraordinary birdlife with white-tailed eagles, black storks and spoonbills

things.name: Holy Cross Franciscan Church
things.description: 18th-century Baroque church in Tvrda with a beautiful interior and Franciscan monastery; one of the oldest religious buildings in Osijek and a cornerstone of the fortress quarter

things.name: Gallery of Fine Arts Osijek
things.description: Important regional art gallery with collections of Croatian art from the 19th century to the present; housed in a fine Art Nouveau building on the European Avenue

things.name: Osijek Zoo
things.description: One of Croatia's oldest zoos (established 1919) set in parkland along the Drava; a popular family destination with a wide variety of animals and pleasant riverside setting

things.name: Gradski Vrt Stadium
things.description: Home of NK Osijek with 19,500 capacity; the club has competed in the UEFA Europa League and Europa Conference League as one of eastern Croatia's leading football clubs
